# Elements of the Philosophy of Right

*[Hegel](../philosophers/hegel.md) · 1820 · *Grundlinien der Philosophie des Rechts**

His political and moral philosophy (1820): from abstract right to morality, then to ethical life (family, civil society, state). [Hegel](../philosophers/hegel.md) criticizes Kantian formalism, refuses the social contract, thinks freedom realized in institutions, and ends on world history as a tribunal. Its preface contains the owl of Minerva.
